message:
feat(core): add ack protocol bridge methods and convenience API (ft-2p9cb.6.3.2)

Bridge: total_acks, total_completions, total_timeouts, total_cancellations,
slow_ack_count, completion_rate, timeout_rate, has_pending, get_pending,
complete_with_explanation, issue_ack_checked (auto-slow detection),
to_invariant_domain, make_progress (clamped fraction). 15 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
